description: This photo captures a semi-natural grassland landscape under a partly cloudy sky, featuring undulating terrain with hills in the background. The foreground consists of dry, yellow-brown herbaceous vegetation, with a wire fence and two wooden posts indicating a boundary. In the midground, a herd of light-coloured sheep is grazing amongst the dry grass, scattered across the field. Several sparse trees with dark green canopies are also visible in the midground, typical of drought-resistant species. The background shows rolling hills densely covered with dark green vegetation. The dry appearance of the grass suggests a dry season or a semi-arid climate, consistent with areas maintained as permanent grasslands by less intensive agricultural activities.
